name: Character requests
description:
Heya! Make a request and make your chat public and I’ll make a giantess bot of the character! (Will also make femboy giant bots but I’m not doing some huge, hyper muscular dude if ya catch my drift.)

Also! No real people, duh.

Alternatively, you can just comment what you want.

Edit: I have been made aware that public chats have been disabled for a long time.. silly me. Simply just put your requests in the comment section—I apologize, I joined this site back in 2023 and wasn’t aware that they had been removed.
creator: RickyLick
